001package net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.model.user.BoxUser;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006import java.util.Optional;
007import java.util.UUID;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009
010/**
011 * An interface to load a {@link BoxUser}.
012 */
013public interface UserManager {
014
015    /**
016     * Loads the {@link BoxUser} of specified {@link UUID}.
017     *
018     * @param uuid the {@link UUID} to load
019     * @return the {@link CompletableFuture} to load the {@link BoxUser}
020     */
021    @NotNull CompletableFuture<@NotNull BoxUser> loadUser(@NotNull UUID uuid);
022
023    /**
024     * Saves the {@link BoxUser}.
025     *
026     * @param boxUser the user to save
027     * @return the {@link CompletableFuture} to save the {@link BoxUser}
028     */
029    @NotNull CompletableFuture<Void> saveUser(@NotNull BoxUser boxUser);
030
031    /**
032     * Saves the {@link BoxUser} if it doesn't exist.
033     *
034     * @param boxUser the user to save
035     * @return the {@link CompletableFuture} to save the {@link BoxUser}
036     */
037    @NotNull CompletableFuture<Void> saveUserIfNotExists(@NotNull BoxUser boxUser);
038
039    /**
040     * Searches for {@link BoxUser} with the specified name.
041     *
042     * @param name the name to search
043     * @return the {@link CompletableFuture} to search for {@link BoxUser}
044     */
045    @NotNull CompletableFuture<Optional<BoxUser>> search(@NotNull String name);
046}
